info.name: ClientFlow API - Full
info.description: Complete ClientFlow backend API collection. Run folders from top to bottom. Cleanup requests are intentionally placed last.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { const result = pm.response.json().result; if (result && result.resetToken) pm.collectionVariables.set("resetToken", result.resetToken); }

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Postman Test Business Updated",
  "slug": "{{slug}}",
  "phone": "0909111222",
  "email": "postman-business@example.com",
  "address": "District 1, Ho Chi Minh City"
}

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { const content = pm.response.json().result.content; if (content && content.length) pm.collectionVariables.set("notificationId", content[0].id); }
if (pm.response.code === 200) { const content = pm.response.json().result.content; if (content && content.length) pm.collectionVariables.set("staffNotificationId", content[0].id); }
const stamp = Date.now().toString(); pm.variables.set("publicCustomerPhone", "09" + stamp.slice(-8)); pm.variables.set("publicCustomerEmail", "public+" + stamp + "@postman.local");
